message:
feat(api,nn): add logsumexp, dist, movedim, aminmax, unfold, renorm, isin ops and reformat

Add seven new tensor operations to FrankenTorchSession:
- tensor_logsumexp: numerically stable log-sum-exp reduction
- tensor_dist: p-norm distance between two tensors
- tensor_movedim: transpose via dimension relocation
- tensor_aminmax: simultaneous min/max along a dimension
- tensor_unfold: sliding window extraction along a dimension
- tensor_renorm: sub-tensor p-norm clamping
- tensor_isin: set membership test returning 0/1 mask

Each op includes comprehensive tests (basic, edge-case, 2D).
Also applies rustfmt formatting fixes across existing tests in both
ft-api and ft-nn (clippy lint fix for `1 * 2 * 2 * 3 * 3` → `2 * 2 * 3 * 3`
in BatchNorm3d test).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
